description: Alternating zigzag rows of image + text for detailed feature presentations. Each row flips the image side creating visual rhythm. Use for product deep-dives, how-it-works sections. Layout: two-column rows alternating image position, stacks on mobile.
label: Alternating Features

features.description: Browse hundreds of extensions to add any feature you need. From SEO to email marketing, there's a plugin for everything.
